dashboard.pages.overview.title: Overview
dashboard.pages.overview.description: Global cockpit for sales, orders, stock, deliveries, clients and claims.
dashboard.pages.sales.title: Sales performance
dashboard.pages.sales.description: Revenue, average basket, best products and top clients analysis.
dashboard.pages.orders.title: Orders
dashboard.pages.orders.description: Order lifecycle management: statuses, payments, delivery modes and risky orders.
dashboard.pages.products.title: Products and catalog
dashboard.pages.products.description: Catalog quality, images, publication and product performance analysis.
dashboard.pages.stock.title: Stock
dashboard.pages.stock.description: Available, reserved, critical and negative stock by warehouse.
dashboard.pages.depots.title: Warehouses
dashboard.pages.depots.description: Activity, available stock and anomalies by warehouse.
dashboard.pages.logistics.title: Delivery
dashboard.pages.logistics.description: Deliveries, returns, postponements, delays and logistics performance.
dashboard.pages.drivers.title: Drivers
dashboard.pages.drivers.description: Workload, assignments and success rate by driver.
dashboard.pages.clients.title: Clients
dashboard.pages.clients.description: B2B/B2C segmentation, client activity, regions and address quality.
dashboard.pages.reclamations.title: Claims
dashboard.pages.reclamations.description: Claims by status, reason, criticality and processing delay.
dashboard.pages.sync.title: Sage synchronization
dashboard.pages.sync.description: Data quality control: articles, images, catalog, stock and clients.
dashboard.pages.insights.title: Strategic insights
dashboard.pages.insights.description: Recommendations based on business rules and analytical aggregations.
dashboard.empty.title: No data
dashboard.empty.description: No data available with the current filters.
dashboard.empty.trendDescription: Trend data is not available for this period.
dashboard.empty.topDescription: No item to display with the current filters.
dashboard.empty.alertDescription: No priority anomaly detected with the current data.
dashboard.empty.tableDescription: No detailed data available with the current filters.
dashboard.errors.title: Loading error
admin.home.title: Control panel
admin.home.description: Quickly access the essential management modules: orders, clients, stock, warehouses, Sage synchronization, staff and analytics.
admin.home.primaryDescription: These modules cover the most important back-office operations.
admin.home.secondaryDescription: These accesses help manage data, logistics, content and application settings.
admin.card.dashboard.title: Decision center
admin.card.dashboard.desc: Access the complete analytics dashboard: sales, orders, stock, logistics and insights.
admin.card.orders.title: Orders and delivery notes
admin.card.orders.desc: Track the full order cycle: confirmations, refusals and conversion to delivery notes.
admin.card.users.title: Users and roles
admin.card.users.desc: Create accounts, manage access and assign roles according to responsibilities.
admin.card.clients.title: Clients
admin.card.clients.desc: View and manage B2B/B2C client profiles, addresses and business information.
admin.card.personnel.title: Operational staff
admin.card.personnel.desc: Manage vendors, confirmators, drivers and internal application accounts.
admin.card.b2b.title: B2B clients and discounts
admin.card.b2b.desc: Configure professional profiles, custom discounts and business conditions.
admin.card.products.title: Articles and catalog
admin.card.products.desc: Manage articles, images, visibility, catalog and synchronized product data.
admin.card.stock.title: Stock
admin.card.stock.desc: Track available, reserved and critical quantities as well as movements by warehouse.
admin.card.depots.title: Warehouses
admin.card.depots.desc: Manage warehouses, locations, availability and logistics assignments.
admin.card.zones.title: Delivery zones
admin.card.zones.desc: Configure covered zones, warehouse-zone assignments and the coverage map.
admin.card.sync.title: Sage synchronization
admin.card.sync.desc: Trigger, monitor and check the consistency of synchronized Sage data.
admin.card.homepage.title: Homepage
admin.card.homepage.desc: Edit content, sections, banners and visible homepage elements.
admin.card.chatbot.title: Admin chatbot
admin.card.chatbot.desc: Analyze conversations, test the chatbot and view automated recommendations.
admin.card.settings.title: Application settings
admin.card.settings.desc: Configure branding, contact information, theme, SEO and global options.
